title: Seeing an Overpass in a Dream
seoDescription: Seeing an overpass in a dream symbolizes your ability to overcome transitional periods and challenges in your life. This dream may indicate your personal development and new beginnings.
introduction: Through dreams, our subconscious communicates messages to us via symbols. Although the overpass is a structure we frequently encounter in modern life, it can carry deep meanings in dreams. The overpass dream may reflect our process of overcoming obstacles in life and our emotional state during this process.
symbolism: An overpass is built to provide a safe and quick passage between two points. In dreams, this structure can represent your ability to overcome challenges in your life and transition to a new phase. Archetypally, the overpass is a bridge; this symbolizes Jung's theme of 'transition.' The overpass may indicate that you are undergoing a significant change or decision-making process in your life within your subconscious.
cosmicAnalysis:
**🌑 New Moon:** Seeing an overpass during the new moon phase is a sign that you can make a new beginning in your life. This may be a suitable time for new projects or relationships.

**🌓 Waxing Moon:** Seeing an overpass during the waxing moon phase symbolizes developing opportunities and your personal growth. During this period, it is advised to progress with determination towards your goals.

**🌕 Full Moon:** Seeing an overpass during the full moon is a sign that you have the strength to overcome current challenges. This may be an emotionally intense period, but you can also gain significant awareness.

**🌗 Waning Moon:** Seeing an overpass during the waning moon phase indicates that it is time to leave past obstacles behind and achieve more balance in your life. This period is a good opportunity to find inner peace.
commonScenarios: Crossing an overpass: Symbolizes that you are in a significant change or transformation process in your life. This may indicate major decisions such as starting a new job or stepping into a relationship.

Passing under the overpass: Indicates that you need to adopt a different perspective or approach to overcome current problems and challenges. Passing underneath may also symbolize avoiding directly addressing issues at times.
